_note: AWS Lambda cannot call 127.0.0.1. Tunnel skill-gateway (3848) for Alexa HTTPS, or N8N (5678) for intake only. last_result_url: POST {userId} to gateway https://<host>/internal/last-result/fetch (returns message + pending reminder). awaiting_user_peek_url / awaiting_user_clear_url: same host …/internal/awaiting-user/peek|clear — see docs/setup.md.
